label: HR
blurb: The company's people footprint, live. Headcount by site, open roles + days-open from the careers feed, and (illustrative) retirement risk.

markers.label: Carnaxide / Lisbon
markers.detail: The SDO / IT + finance delivery hub — where STG is staffing up hardest for the OneProcess (SAP) transformation.

markers.label: Dominican Republic
markers.detail: Largest site. The open roles are the San Pedro de Macorís SAP ERP-support team — the transformation, staffed here. *Retirement-risk illustrative.

markers.label: Bethlehem, PA
markers.detail: Cigars International HQ — a mix of IT, marketing and retail roles.

markers.label: Sri Lanka — Biyagama
markers.detail: Wrapper/binder leaf site — workshop & production roles.

markers.label: Richmond, VA
markers.detail: Forged Cigars commercial office (the Sutliff factory at this site closed Feb 2025).

markers.label: Indonesia — Semarang
markers.detail: Machine-rolled cigars + leaf — a senior finance hire.

markers.label: Belgium — Lummen/Westerlo
markers.detail: Machine-rolled cigar workforce — a continuously-reposted technician role.

markers.label: Honduras — Danlí
markers.detail: Handmade cigar workforce. No open roles in the latest crawl.

markers.label: US retail & bars
markers.detail: STG United States retail & cigar-bar footprint — Cigars International superstores, lounges and bars across the US (FL, TX, TN, KY, PA, NY and more). Counted in the live total; click to see the open roles.

markers.label: Europe — field & other
markers.detail: STG roles across Europe not tied to a mapped site — field sales (Netherlands, Sweden, UK) plus support / production roles such as Holstebro (DK). Counted in the live total; click to see them.

agentNote: Open-positions + days-open come from STG's public SuccessFactors careers feed (careers.st-group.com). Strategic sites are mapped to markers; US retail / cigar-bar roles are counted in the total but bucketed (not the strategy). Evergreen 'talent pool' posts are excluded. Real one-time pull 2026-06-14; a scheduled refresh first-seen-stamps each role to derive days-open. Retirement-risk is illustrative (needs PeopleHub).
